text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! All those fan letters on your desk are
really for me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's eyes light up when she sees
the pile of letters addressed to her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You bet! And it's all thanks to your daily
guidance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory bows deeply in appreciation
before opening the letters and reading them.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this. "Every time I see you run with such
power and passion, my heart starts pounding!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And this one. "Your recent race was so intense!
I've never been so excited watching a race
before!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's such an honor to get this much praise!
And this next one...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
"The cheerful way you greet everyone in front of
the school gates gives me life! You have my
support!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Are they recognizing my role as chair of the
disciplinary committee?!
choice_data_list: You are always working hard at it.
You are always working hard at it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No way. I'm just doing what the position calls for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want the academy to be a place where our
students can learn in peace and chase their
dreams! That's what the disciplinary committee is
for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't do it for any kind of recognition. Still...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's nice to receive such kind words.
choice_data_list: Keep up the good work, on and off the track!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do what I need to do to keep both the
racing fans and the disciplinary committee fans all
happy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Which means I need YOU to work me TO THE
BONE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's determined plea resounds
through the heavens.
